zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes d'Aldwark於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾阿爾德瓦可時，她的父親Reginald de Aldwark V17歲，母親Catherine le Fleming17歲。她與John de Saville II結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭越可爾布利德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes d'Aldwark于大约1180年出生在英国英格兰越可爾阿爾德瓦可时，她的父亲Reginald de Aldwark V17岁，母亲Catherine le Fleming17岁。她与John de Saville II结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰越可爾布利德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes d'Aldwark was born about 1180, in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Reginald de Aldwark V, was 17 and her mother, Catherine le Fleming, was 17. She married John de Saville II. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes d'Aldwark est née environ 1180, à Aldwark, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald de Aldwark V, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Catherine le Fleming, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John de Saville II. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes d'Aldwark um 1180 in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald de Aldwark V 17 und ihre Mutter Catherine le Fleming 17. Sie hat John de Saville II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes d'Aldwark è nata il circa 1180 nel Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Reginald de Aldwark V, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Catherine le Fleming, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John de Saville II. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes d'Aldwarkが約1180年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークで生まれた時，父Reginald de Aldwark Vは17歳，母Catherine le Flemingは17歳であった。John de Saville IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブリドリントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes d'Aldwark(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 알드워크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald de Aldwark V(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine le Fleming(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 John de Saville II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브리들링턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes d'Aldwark nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Aldwark V, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Catherine le Fleming, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Saville II. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes d'Aldwark родилась около 1180 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reginald de Aldwark V было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine le Fleming, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Saville II. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes d'Aldwark nació aproximadamente 1180, en Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald de Aldwark V, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Catherine le Fleming, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John de Saville II. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
